reasons: Angela can protect Martis while he commits into a fight.
Martis benefits from extra sustain and movement support because his value depends on staying active through repeated skill casts and execution windows.

proof.summary: Martis commits into melee skirmishes, and Angela strengthens his survival during that window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches during Martis's real fight entry.
Martis uses the shield to finish targets, not to chase too far alone.
failureCases: Angela attaches before Martis is ready.
Martis enters into too much burst or suppression.

reasons: Kaja can isolate a target and let Martis enter with a clearer kill path.
Martis can use his damage and execute pressure after Kaja forces the target into a bad position.

proof.summary: Kaja starts the single-target catch, and Martis follows with melee pressure and execution threat.
worksBestWhen: Martis is close enough to follow immediately.
failureCases: Martis cannot reach before the target gets peel.

reasons: Atlas can group enemies and force a fight where Martis can enter with control and execution pressure.
Martis benefits when enemies are already displaced or slowed before he starts melee trading.

proof.summary: Atlas creates the grouped fight, and Martis follows with melee control and finishing pressure.
worksBestWhen: Martis enters after Atlas's setup, not before.
failureCases: Atlas misses or catches only a tank.
Martis enters too early and gets focused before the setup lands.

reasons: Floryn can support Martis during extended skirmishes, including when he dives beyond normal support range.
Her global-style healing value helps Martis survive long enough to reach an execution window.

proof.summary: Martis wants to keep fighting through low-health targets, while Floryn adds sustain support during the commit.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves healing for Martis's real fight.
Martis uses the sustain window to finish targets or disengage.
failureCases: Martis is bursted before healing matters.
Floryn's key skill is on cooldown during the execution window.

reasons: Rafaela's speed support helps Martis chase or reposition in skirmishes.
Her healing gives Martis more room to stay active while looking for execution resets.

proof.summary: Rafaela supports Martis's extended skirmish pattern with heal and movement speed.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela times speed boost as Martis enters or chases.
Martis avoids overextending outside healing range.
failureCases: Burst damage removes him before sustain matters.
